Fixtures for the WebGPU golden test. The `.brotlig` files were produced by
the CPU-only sample CLI (`bin/brotlig_cpu`, built from the `brotlig_cpu_cli`
CMake target). Each `<name>.{bin,txt}` is the uncompressed input, `<name>.{bin,txt}.golden` is the expected decoded bytes, and `<name>.brotlig` is the compressed form.
